page.upload.title: Upload File
page.upload.desc: Drag and drop or click to select an Excel / CSV file for quality assessment
page.assessment.title: Quality Assessment Results
page.cleaning.title: Data Cleaning
page.cleaning.desc: Select cleaning rules and run batch data cleaning
page.export.title: Cleaning Results Overview
page.login.title: Login
page.login.desc: Enter your credentials to access the system
page.register.title: Register
page.register.desc: Create a new account to use the SAFE-AI Data Brushing Platform
indicator.row_completeness.desc: Measures the fill rate of each row
indicator.column_completeness.desc: Measures the fill rate of each column
indicator.format_consistency.desc: Measures format uniformity within each column
indicator.data_uniqueness.desc: Measures data completeness and uniqueness per ISO/IEC 25024
indicator.table_structure.desc: Measures whether the table structure is clean and well-organized
indicator.ai_query_readiness.desc: Measures whether data structure meets AI/ML schema quality requirements
error.assessment_not_found: Assessment record not found. Please upload a file first.
error.upload_failed: Upload failed. Please try again later.
error.login_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
error.register_failed: Registration failed. Please try again later.
error.password_length: Password must be between 8 and 72 characters
error.cleaning_not_found: Cleaning record not found. Please run data cleaning first.
error.no_cleaning_record: No cleaning record found. Please run data cleaning first.
error.download_failed: Download failed. Please try again later.
error.quota_exceeded: Assessment quota exhausted. Please contact your administrator.
error.invalid_locale: Unsupported locale. Only zh-TW and en are supported.
error.quota_validation: Invalid quota settings: max_assessments must be a positive integer, reset_period must be daily or weekly
common.show_first_n: Showing first 5 entries only. See more in the Cleaning step.
common.ready_for_assess: AI Readiness quality assessment will begin after selecting a worksheet
upload.drop_desc: Or click to select a file (.xlsx, .csv, max 50MB)
rule.date_normalize.desc: Unify various date formats to yyyy-MM-dd
rule.name_normalize.desc: Unify different spellings of company names to the most common version
rule.subtotal_remove.desc: Delete non-data rows containing subtotals or totals
rule.newline_remove.desc: Replace newline characters in cells with spaces
rule.bracket_note_remove.desc: Remove bracketed annotation content from cells
rule.empty_row_remove.desc: Delete rows where all columns are empty
rule.multi_table_keep_main.desc: Keep the largest contiguous data block, remove sections separated by blank rows
rule.empty_col_remove.desc: Remove columns with over 80% empty values to improve data completeness
export.no_resolved: No issues were resolved in this cleaning pass
assessment.conditional_hint: Recommended to clean before AI applications
assessment.not_ready_hint: Not recommended for direct AI application use
assessment.empty_col_hint: Highly empty columns (red columns recommended for removal, click header to toggle)
assessment.data_blocks_hint: Data blocks (select block to keep, others will be removed)
nav.stepper_disabled: Please complete the previous steps first
tooltip.quota_exhausted: Assessment quota exhausted. Please contact your administrator.
